title: Light of Reason
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Light of Reason''''' was an old battered [[Sienar]] [[H-10]] brig that brought [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] and his party onboard the ''[[Adamantine]]'' to meet [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] believed the ship was so small it only had a capacity to hold six passengers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1998-06-30 -->''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
